title: Why Digital Skills Are the New Literacy for African Youth
author: Orao Impact Team
excerpt: Across Africa, millions of young people are graduating into a digital economy without the tools to participate fully. We explore why coding, AI literacy, and digital fluency are no longer optional — they are the new literacy.

title: How meSafe Is Reimagining Community Safety in Nigeria
author: Orao Impact Team
excerpt: Community safety is a shared responsibility. The meSafe platform is giving everyday citizens tools to report, connect, and respond — building safer neighbourhoods from the ground up.

title: Shopmon: Helping African SMEs Thrive in the Digital Economy
author: Orao Impact Team
excerpt: Small and medium enterprises are the backbone of African economies, yet most remain offline. The Shopmon initiative by Orao Impact Foundation is changing that — one business at a time.
